title: Johor Property Intelligence Center
subtitle: Authoritative market intelligence · 7 projects · EN/ZH
intro: Malaysia Property Network Research Center delivers structured dossiers for Johor Bahru & Iskandar investors — developer profiles, completion timelines, property types, rental ranges, yields, occupancy, tenant fit, pros/cons and investment scores.

pillars.title: Market data
pillars.desc: Rental ranges, yields and occupancy grounded in Sprint 03 inventory and district benchmarks.

pillars.title: Project depth
pillars.desc: Standalone dossiers for 7 key projects with developer and pros/cons analysis.

pillars.title: Investment scoring
pillars.desc: 0–100 composite score for cross-project comparison and decision support.

pillars.title: Owner services
pillars.desc: Intelligence linked to management, inspection and viewing services — not a lead farm.

ctaDesc: Browse the project intelligence directory or compare popular project pairs.

labels.notAdvice: For research purposes only — not financial advice.
